description: Automated browser testing, load testing, visual regression, and cross-browser/device testing platforms.

entries.name: BrowserStack
entries.summary: Real-device and browser cloud for manual and automated cross-browser/cross-device testing.
entries.freeTier: Free trial available; open-source projects can apply for free ongoing access.

entries.name: Sauce Labs
entries.summary: Cloud-based platform for automated and live testing across browsers, OSs, and real mobile devices.
entries.freeTier: Open Sauce program offers free access for qualifying open-source projects.
entries.paidFrom: Virtual Cloud plan billed by usage/minutes.

entries.name: Playwright
entries.summary: Microsoft's open-source end-to-end testing framework supporting Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit.

entries.name: Cypress
entries.summary: JavaScript end-to-end testing framework with a real-time test runner; Cypress Cloud adds dashboards and parallelization.
entries.freeTier: Cypress test runner is free/open source; Cypress Cloud free tier includes limited test results recording.

entries.name: k6 (Grafana)
entries.summary: Open-source load testing tool with a developer-friendly scripting API; Grafana Cloud k6 adds managed test execution.
entries.freeTier: CLI tool fully free and open source; Cloud k6 has limited free virtual user hours/month.
entries.paidFrom: Cloud plans billed by virtual user hours.

entries.name: Postman
entries.summary: API client and testing platform for building, testing, and documenting REST/GraphQL/gRPC APIs.
entries.freeTier: Free for up to 3 users with core collection/testing features.

entries.name: Percy (BrowserStack)
entries.summary: Visual regression testing tool that screenshots UI states and flags pixel-level diffs across builds.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited monthly screenshots.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans billed per screenshot volume.

entries.name: Loader.io
entries.summary: Cloud-based load testing service from SendGrid for stress-testing APIs and websites.
entries.freeTier: Free plan with limited concurrent clients and test runs.
entries.paidFrom: Paid plans increase concurrent client limits.

entries.name: TestRail
entries.summary: Test case management platform for organizing, tracking, and reporting on manual and automated test runs.
entries.freeTier: Free tier for small teams (limited users).
